t212_csv_empty: CSV file is empty or has no data rows.
t212_missing_action_column: Missing "Action" column. This may not be a Trading212 CSV export.
t212_interest_income_out_of_scope: Detected {{count}} interest-income row(s) (e.g. "Interest on cash"). InvesTax does not calculate interest income; it is taxable (venituri din dobanzi) and must be declared separately.
t212_missing_total_column: Could not find a total column on {{count}} row(s). Trading212 names it "Total" or "Total (<currency>)" after your account's base currency. Without it the amounts on those rows read as zero, which would under-report your declaration.
t212_unreadable_numeric_value: Could not read {{count}} numeric value(s) in this file (e.g. {{examples}}). Trading212 exports plain numbers such as "1505.00". A value we cannot read falls back to a default (zero, or a 1:1 exchange rate), which would misstate your declaration.
t212_no_transactions_parsed: No transactions could be parsed from this file.
t212pdf_broker_mismatch: This does not look like a Trading 212 statement (no recognizable sections found). If it is an Interactive Brokers statement, upload its CSV Activity Statement instead.
t212pdf_year_not_detected: Could not detect year from PDF. Defaulting to {{year}}.
t212pdf_sell_section_unparsed: Sell trades section found but no rows could be parsed. The PDF format may differ from expected.
t212pdf_sell_section_missing: No sell trades section found in the PDF.
t212pdf_dividend_section_unparsed: Dividend section found but no rows could be parsed.
t212pdf_no_invest_account: No Invest account section found in this PDF. InvesTax only calculates tax for Trading 212 Invest accounts. Please upload your Invest account annual statement.
t212pdf_sell_total_mismatch: Parsed sell-trade per-row sum ({{parsed}}) differs from overview ({{overview}}). Engine will pick the most reliable source based on transaction currency consistency.
t212pdf_dividend_gross_mismatch: Parsed dividend gross ({{parsed}}) differs from overview gross dividends ({{overview}}). Some rows may not have been parsed.
ibkr_csv_empty: CSV file is empty or has no data rows.
ibkr_unreadable_row_date: Could not read the date "{{date}}" in the {{section}} section; that row was skipped. Please report this so we can support your statement's date format.
ibkr_withholding_security_unidentified: Could not identify the security for a withholding-tax row dated {{date}}; tax credit not applied.
ibkr_withholding_no_matching_dividend: Withholding tax of {{amount}} for "{{security}}" ({{year}}) has no matching dividend and was not applied.
ibkr_non_stock_positions_skipped: Skipped non-stock positions ({{categories}}). InvesTax currently supports stocks and ETFs only.
ibkr_unsupported_currencies_skipped: Unsupported currencies found ({{currencies}}). InvesTax supports USD, EUR, GBP and RON; those rows were skipped.
ibkr_interest_withholding_skipped: Skipped {{count}} withholding-tax row(s) on interest income (not on a dividend). InvesTax currently calculates dividends and capital gains only, not interest income.
ibkr_not_an_activity_statement: This does not look like an IBKR Activity Statement (no Trades, Dividends or Withholding Tax section found).
ibkr_no_transactions_parsed: No transactions could be parsed from this file.
revolut_file_empty: File is empty or has no data rows.
revolut_not_an_account_statement: This does not look like a Revolut Account Statement (no Date / Type / Total Amount columns found). Export it via Invest > More > Documents > Stocks > Account Statement > Excel.
revolut_reverse_split_unapplied: Stock split for "{{ticker}}" on row {{row}} could not be applied automatically. Check this position before filing.
revolut_unsupported_currencies_skipped: Unsupported currencies found ({{currencies}}). InvesTax supports USD, EUR, GBP and RON; those rows were skipped.
revolut_unrecognised_types_skipped: Unrecognised transaction types found ({{types}}). Those rows were skipped; check them before filing.
revolut_no_transactions_parsed: No transactions could be parsed from this file.
splits_reverse_split_unapplied: Reverse stock split for {{ticker}} on {{date}} could not be applied automatically. Verify this position before filing.
